prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
You've got this! Starting a challenging task can be intimidating, but taking that first step is crucial. Remember that progress often begins with a small action and builds momentum from there. 

Believe in your abilities and embrace the opportunity to grow and learn. Breaking down the task into manageable chunks can make it seem less daunting. Focus on the sense of accomplishment you'll feel once you get started and then as you work your way through it. 

You have the power to overcome this challenge, and every difficult task is an opportunity for self-improvement. Your hard work and dedication will pay off, so dive in and give it your best effort. You can do it!
